name: Golden Sky Minerals Corp.
summary: Golden Sky Minerals Corp. acquires, explores for, develops, and evaluates mineral properties in Canada. The company primarily explores for gold deposits. Its main project is the Lucky Strike property that covers an area of 150 square kilometers located in the Yukon Territory of Canada. The company was formerly known as Luckystrike Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Golden Sky Minerals Corp. in February 2020. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
